center.name: Khingan Nature Reserve
center.summary: Khingan Nature Reserve是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白枕鶴，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-naped crane breeds in northeastern Mongolia, northeastern China, and adjacent areas of southeastern Russia, where a program at Khingan Nature Reserve raises eggs provided from U.S

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The white-naped crane breeds in northeastern Mongolia, northeastern China, and adjacent areas of southeastern Russia, where a program at Khingan Nature Reserve raises eggs provided from U.S
